zh.York, North Yorkshire, England, United K: 英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾約克
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Vavasour於1260年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾約克時，他的父親John le Vavasour25歲，母親Matilda de Stopham25歲。他於1285年與Agnes de Beneville在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Vavasour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: status name for a feudal tenant ranking immediately below a baron, Old French vavas(s)our, vavasseur, Latin vassus vassorum ‘vassal of vassals’.

variants.name: Bavister
meanings: English: Titford suggests that this is a late variant of Vavasour . It would be a dissimilated form of Vavister and Vavester, variants of Vavasour that are evidenced in Lincs, also in Cambs, whence the name spread into Beds. Compare Willa Vavister, 1579 in IGI (Scopwick, Lincs); Thomas Vavister, 1615 in IGI (Cranwell, Lincs); Mary Vavester, 1708, Joseph Vavisor, 1738 in IGI (New Sleaford, Lincs).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Vavasour was born in 1260, in York, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John le Vavasour, was 25 and his mother, Matilda de Stopham, was 25. He married Agnes de Beneville in 1285, in York, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

Il a épousé Agnes de Beneville en 1285, à York, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

ja.York, North Yorkshire, England, United K: イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアヨーク
ja.lifeSummary: John Vavasourが1260年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアヨークで生まれた時，父John le Vavasourは25歳，母Matilda de Stophamは25歳であった。1285年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアヨークでAgnes de Benevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: John Vavasour(이)가 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 요르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John le Vavasour(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Stopham(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 요르크에서 Agnes de Beneville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.
